title: Add text to text column using automation

posts.author: GustavoM (J. Gustavo M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I was trying to add a text note using an automation to a text columns, but I found out that it is not possible at the moment.

It would be nice to have this option available that could be used in many different cases.

In our case we found out that this is not available trying to add a text note automatically to a text column in an item already created by clients using a form, with the intention to continue an automatic workflow.

Thanks a lot!
Regards!
Gustavo
